TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Paul_Biya, title = Paul_Biya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paul_Biya} }

S.FORM: == Paul Biya == Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 2 jiyax 13 ka Paul Biya ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Cameron ta sayang o kiya ka Paul Biya, pnaah hngkawas 1982 idas 11 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Paul Biya Paul Biya(kngkawas 1933 idas 2 diyax 13Ôľć), Cameroonian na Tucayce, Soto Cameroonian saya, snpeyyah kngkawas 1975 pnrdingan u ida Paul Biya ka Cameroonian na knbaraw balay mdudul niya, Paul Biya uri ka knkana bnkuwan qnlangan tu2 knrudan niya qnlhangan mpdudul niya. Kndusan niya Paul Biya u mntuting alang Mumeka. Paul Biya pa kngkawas 1961 cida u snpeyyah Pyasan Tubeyhing Paris Seyji na Pnluban Qnlangan Seymung mnhdu muyas. Tu1 qridin niya Paul Biya ka Jeanne-Ir√®ne Biya, mniq kngkawas 1992 idas 7 diyax 29 mrdang, ddha dha u ini tquli laqi. Kngkawas 1994 idas 4 diyax 23 cida, Paul Biya pa tuhuy swayi hiya 38 knkawas na Chantal Biya msturung, ddha dha pa tnquli 2 laqi. Kndusan Seyji niya Mniq Ahmadou Ahicho ka ngalan Soto kngkkawas cida, wada pkrana balay hnyuwan Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1968 dhuq kngkawas 1975 cida ngalan Sotohu Misucang ka Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1975 dhuq kngkawas 1982 cida daw ngalan Congri. Wada kasi krdang kngkawas 1982 cida ka Ahicho daw, Paul Biya ka rmirih Soto da. Kngkawas 1983 dhuq 1984 cida Paul Biya mniq kcka mtdiyal ppluk biyax u wada sndhu hnyuwan niya Soto. Kngkkawas 1980 cida, Paul Biya u mniq 1 Pnwaya Tang muda knpriyux quri uuda seyji 4 DX4EE. Kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan cida, wada niqan mchdil uuda daw muru Pnwaya Knou Tang ka hiya. Kngkawas 1992 cida, Paul Biya pa wada muri bay mangal Soto seyngkyo. Babaw niya daw wada mniq kngkawas 1997, kngkawas 2004 mi kngkawas 2011 Paul Biya u wada krinah balay mbiyax mangal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kiya mi kcka qnlhangan Hataypay mi qnlhangan tuiwil ka ngalan dha kcka seykyo niyi pa niqan smliq waya mi mqbling nuda dha. Ddulan quri Paul Biya ka Cameroonian mi Cameroonian brah Conhcukwo‚ÄĒ‚ÄĒFrance Smriq kari Ana so hmuya mbiyax bay muda psbalay knpriyux quri uuda seyji ka Paul Biya, binaw seyhu Paul Biya u ida muda snturung smriq kari quri Weycweyn Cuyi. Mniq kcka keyngpo u, Paul Biya u muda pkrana Biyax Singcng mi Biyax Phiyu Waya, iyux pkrana quri Biyax Shwa mi ddulun niya. Wana mniq dnurun Paul Biya u kiya ka niqan biyax muda smliq waya keyngpo muda singsa. Dndulan niya Paul Biya ka cngtang Cameroonian Jnmin Mincu Undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balay Kwohuy nina (mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 7 mnuda ka kcka Kwohuy seyngkyo u, 163 hiyi ka knkana giying u tang dha pa wada mangal 153 hiyi giying), so niyi ka mnuda Kwohuy u pndungus bay sntangan niya Paul Biya u sndhu bay lxanan horicu. Kngkawas 2009 cida, America Singbung Cac"Parade"u wada dha ngalan"Qnlangan tubrah 20 bang Tucayce" na tu19. Kngkawas 2010 idas 11, mpatas niya Cameroonian ka Bertrand Teyou u mnatas 1 patas, kcka niya u matas quri ndanan qridin niya Chantal Biya u snpeyyah qrinuc na pingmin wada mnqnlhangan tu1 Hujn. Babaw niya daw Teyou u alaw 'Tnseyyax sediq, mi pssli 'Smliq waya mssli' (tameysu muda mn1 ptrawah bay uuda smpu patas) na cumi wada pthmuk sapah kung 2 knkawas. Amnesty International mi PEN u muda knciyuk hiya mi wada qrapun, Amnesty International u wada niya ngalan ryosing cumi ka hangan niya uri. Kngkawas 2011 idas 5 diyax 2, alaw PEN na London cida kay smruwa muway hbangan sanun pqita narux hiyi niya mi wada plaxun. Pnyahan pnatas ťÉ≠śėéś≠£ ŤÄĀŚłę
S.PHON: == paul bija == mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka paul bija ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ¶am…ô…ĺon ta sajaŇč o kija ka paul bija, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. paul bija paul bija(kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), ¶am…ô…ĺoonian na tu ¶aj ¶…ô, soto ¶am…ô…ĺoonian saja, snp…ôjańß kŇčkawas **** pn…ĺdiŇčan u ida paul bija ka ¶am…ô…ĺoonian na knba…ĺaw balaj mdudul nija, paul bija u…ĺi ka knkana bnkuwan qnlaŇčan tu* kn…ĺudan nija qnlńßaŇčan mpdudul nija. kndusan nija paul bija u mntutiŇč alaŇč mum…ôka. paul bija pa kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u snp…ôjańß pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč pa…ĺis s…ô…üi na pnluban qnlaŇčan s…ômuŇč mnńßdu mujas. tu* q…ĺidin nija paul bija ka …ü…ôann…ô-i…ĺ*n…ô bija, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** m…ĺdaŇč, ddńßa dńßa u ini tquli laqi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, paul bija pa tuńßuj swaji ńßija ** knkawas na ¶ńßantal bija mstu…ĺuŇč, ddńßa dńßa pa tnquli * laqi. kndusan s…ô…üi nija mniq ańßmadou ańßi ¶ńßo ka Ňčalan soto kŇčkkawas ¶ida, wada pk…ĺana balaj ńßnjuwan paul bija. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida Ňčalan sotońßu misu ¶aŇč ka paul bija. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida daw Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi. wada kasi k…ĺdaŇč kŇčkawas **** ¶ida ka ańßi ¶ńßo daw, paul bija ka …ĺmi…ĺińß soto da. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq **** ¶ida paul bija mniq k ¶ka mtdijal ppluk bijax u wada sndńßu ńßnjuwan nija soto. kŇčkkawas **** ¶ida, paul bija u mniq * pnwaja taŇč muda knp…ĺijux qu…ĺi uuda s…ô…üi * dx*…ô…ô. kŇčkkawas **** pn…ĺdiŇčan ¶ida, wada niqan m ¶ńßdil uuda daw mu…ĺu pnwaja knou taŇč ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, paul bija pa wada mu…ĺi baj maŇčal soto s…ôŇčkjo. babaw nija daw wada mniq kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas **** mi kŇčkawas **** paul bija u wada k…ĺinańß balaj mbijax maŇčal lmutu ¶ qpańßun soto. kija mi k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan ńßatajpaj mi qnlńßaŇčan tuiwil ka Ňčalan dńßa k ¶ka s…ôkjo niji pa niqan smliq waja mi mqbliŇč nuda dńßa. ddulan qu…ĺi paul bija ka ¶am…ô…ĺoonian mi ¶am…ô…ĺoonian b…ĺańß ¶onńß ¶ukwo***…ĺan ¶…ô sm…ĺiq ka…ĺi ana so ńßmuja mbijax baj muda psbalaj knp…ĺijux qu…ĺi uuda s…ô…üi ka paul bija, binaw s…ôńßu paul bija u ida muda sntu…ĺuŇč sm…ĺiq ka…ĺi qu…ĺi w…ô ¶w…ôn ¶uji. mniq k ¶ka k…ôŇčpo u, paul bija u muda pk…ĺana bijax siŇč ¶Ňč mi bijax pńßiju waja, ijux pk…ĺana qu…ĺi bijax sńßwa mi ddulun nija. wana mniq dnu…ĺun paul bija u kija ka niqan bijax muda smliq waja k…ôŇčpo muda siŇčsa. dndulan nija paul bija ka ¶ŇčtaŇč ¶am…ô…ĺoonian …ünmin min ¶u undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balaj kwońßuj nina (mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * mnuda ka k ¶ka kwońßuj s…ôŇčkjo u, *** ńßiji ka knkana gijiŇč u taŇč dńßa pa wada maŇčal *** ńßiji gijiŇč), so niji ka mnuda kwońßuj u pnduŇčus baj sntaŇčan nija paul bija u sndńßu baj lxanan ńßo…ĺi ¶u. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, am…ô…ĺi ¶a siŇčbuŇč ¶a ¶"pa…ĺad…ô"u wada dńßa Ňčalan"qnlaŇčan tub…ĺańß ** baŇč tu ¶aj ¶…ô" na tu**. kŇčkawas **** idas **, mpatas nija ¶am…ô…ĺoonian ka b…ô…ĺt…ĺand t…ôou u mnatas * patas, k ¶ka nija u matas qu…ĺi ndanan q…ĺidin nija ¶ńßantal bija u snp…ôjańß q…ĺinu ¶ na piŇčmin wada mnqnlńßaŇčan tu* ńßu…ün. babaw nija daw t…ôou u alaw 'tns…ôjax s…ôdiq, mi pssli 'smliq waja mssli' (tam…ôsu muda mn* pt…ĺawańß baj uuda smpu patas) na ¶umi wada ptńßmuk sapańß kuŇč * knkawas. amn…ôstj int…ô…ĺnational mi p…ôn u muda kn ¶ijuk ńßija mi wada q…ĺapun, amn…ôstj int…ô…ĺnational u wada nija Ňčalan …ĺjosiŇč ¶umi ka ńßaŇčan nija u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, alaw p…ôn na london ¶ida kaj sm…ĺuwa muwaj ńßbaŇčan sanun pqita na…ĺux ńßiji nija mi wada plaxun. pnjańßan pnatas *** **
S.FORM: == Paul Biya == Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 2 jiyax 13 ka Paul Biya ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Cameron ta sayang o kiya ka Paul Biya, pnaah hngkawas 1982 idas 11 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Paul Biya Paul Biya(kngkawas 1933 idas 2 diyax 13Ôľć), Cameroonian na Tucayce, Soto Cameroonian saya, snpeyyah kngkawas 1975 pnrdingan u ida Paul Biya ka Cameroonian na knbaraw balay mdudul niya, Paul Biya uri ka knkana bnkuwan qnlangan tu2 knrudan niya qnlhangan mpdudul niya. Kndusan niya Paul Biya u mntuting alang Mumeka. Paul Biya pa kngkawas 1961 cida u snpeyyah Pyasan Tubeyhing Paris Seyji na Pnluban Qnlangan Seymung mnhdu muyas. Tu1 qridin niya Paul Biya ka Jeanne-Ir√®ne Biya, mniq kngkawas 1992 idas 7 diyax 29 mrdang, ddha dha u ini tquli laqi. Kngkawas 1994 idas 4 diyax 23 cida, Paul Biya pa tuhuy swayi hiya 38 knkawas na Chantal Biya msturung, ddha dha pa tnquli 2 laqi. Kndusan Seyji niya Mniq Ahmadou Ahicho ka ngalan Soto kngkkawas cida, wada pkrana balay hnyuwan Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1968 dhuq kngkawas 1975 cida ngalan Sotohu Misucang ka Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1975 dhuq kngkawas 1982 cida daw ngalan Congri. Wada kasi krdang kngkawas 1982 cida ka Ahicho daw, Paul Biya ka rmirih Soto da. Kngkawas 1983 dhuq 1984 cida Paul Biya mniq kcka mtdiyal ppluk biyax u wada sndhu hnyuwan niya Soto. Kngkkawas 1980 cida, Paul Biya u mniq 1 Pnwaya Tang muda knpriyux quri uuda seyji 4 DX4EE. Kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan cida, wada niqan mchdil uuda daw muru Pnwaya Knou Tang ka hiya. Kngkawas 1992 cida, Paul Biya pa wada muri bay mangal Soto seyngkyo. Babaw niya daw wada mniq kngkawas 1997, kngkawas 2004 mi kngkawas 2011 Paul Biya u wada krinah balay mbiyax mangal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kiya mi kcka qnlhangan Hataypay mi qnlhangan tuiwil ka ngalan dha kcka seykyo niyi pa niqan smliq waya mi mqbling nuda dha. Ddulan quri Paul Biya ka Cameroonian mi Cameroonian brah Conhcukwo‚ÄĒ‚ÄĒFrance Smriq kari Ana so hmuya mbiyax bay muda psbalay knpriyux quri uuda seyji ka Paul Biya, binaw seyhu Paul Biya u ida muda snturung smriq kari quri Weycweyn Cuyi. Mniq kcka keyngpo u, Paul Biya u muda pkrana Biyax Singcng mi Biyax Phiyu Waya, iyux pkrana quri Biyax Shwa mi ddulun niya. Wana mniq dnurun Paul Biya u kiya ka niqan biyax muda smliq waya keyngpo muda singsa. Dndulan niya Paul Biya ka cngtang Cameroonian Jnmin Mincu Undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balay Kwohuy nina (mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 7 mnuda ka kcka Kwohuy seyngkyo u, 163 hiyi ka knkana giying u tang dha pa wada mangal 153 hiyi giying), so niyi ka mnuda Kwohuy u pndungus bay sntangan niya Paul Biya u sndhu bay lxanan horicu. Kngkawas 2009 cida, America Singbung Cac"Parade"u wada dha ngalan"Qnlangan tubrah 20 bang Tucayce" na tu19. Kngkawas 2010 idas 11, mpatas niya Cameroonian ka Bertrand Teyou u mnatas 1 patas, kcka niya u matas quri ndanan qridin niya Chantal Biya u snpeyyah qrinuc na pingmin wada mnqnlhangan tu1 Hujn. Babaw niya daw Teyou u alaw 'Tnseyyax sediq, mi pssli 'Smliq waya mssli' (tameysu muda mn1 ptrawah bay uuda smpu patas) na cumi wada pthmuk sapah kung 2 knkawas. Amnesty International mi PEN u muda knciyuk hiya mi wada qrapun, Amnesty International u wada niya ngalan ryosing cumi ka hangan niya uri. Kngkawas 2011 idas 5 diyax 2, alaw PEN na London cida kay smruwa muway hbangan sanun pqita narux hiyi niya mi wada plaxun. Pnyahan pnatas ťÉ≠śėéś≠£ ŤÄĀŚłę

pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. paul bija paul bija(kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), ¶am…ô…ĺoonian na tu ¶aj ¶…ô, soto ¶am…ô…ĺoonian saja, snp…ôjańß kŇčkawas **** pn…ĺdiŇčan u ida paul bija ka ¶am…ô…ĺoonian na knba…ĺaw balaj mdudul nija, paul bija u…ĺi ka knkana bnkuwan qnlaŇčan tu* kn…ĺudan nija qnlńßaŇčan mpdudul nija. kndusan nija paul bija u mntutiŇč alaŇč mum…ôka. paul bija pa kŇčkawas **** ¶ida u snp…ôjańß pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč pa…ĺis s…ô…üi na pnluban qnlaŇčan s…ômuŇč mnńßdu mujas. tu* q…ĺidin nija paul bija ka …ü…ôann…ô-i…ĺ*n…ô bija, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** m…ĺdaŇč, ddńßa dńßa u ini tquli laqi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, paul bija pa tuńßuj swaji ńßija ** knkawas na ¶ńßantal bija mstu…ĺuŇč, ddńßa dńßa pa tnquli * laqi. kndusan s…ô…üi nija mniq ańßmadou ańßi ¶ńßo ka Ňčalan soto kŇčkkawas ¶ida, wada pk…ĺana balaj ńßnjuwan paul bija. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida Ňčalan sotońßu misu ¶aŇč ka paul bija. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida daw Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi. wada kasi k…ĺdaŇč kŇčkawas **** ¶ida ka ańßi ¶ńßo daw, paul bija ka …ĺmi…ĺińß soto da. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq **** ¶ida paul bija mniq k ¶ka mtdijal ppluk bijax u wada sndńßu ńßnjuwan nija soto. kŇčkkawas **** ¶ida, paul bija u mniq * pnwaja taŇč muda knp…ĺijux qu…ĺi uuda s…ô…üi * dx*…ô…ô. kŇčkkawas **** pn…ĺdiŇčan ¶ida, wada niqan m ¶ńßdil uuda daw mu…ĺu pnwaja knou taŇč ka ńßija. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, paul bija pa wada mu…ĺi baj maŇčal soto s…ôŇčkjo. babaw nija daw wada mniq kŇčkawas ****, kŇčkawas **** mi kŇčkawas **** paul bija u wada k…ĺinańß balaj mbijax maŇčal lmutu ¶ qpańßun soto. kija mi k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan ńßatajpaj mi qnlńßaŇčan tuiwil ka Ňčalan dńßa k ¶ka s…ôkjo niji pa niqan smliq waja mi mqbliŇč nuda dńßa. ddulan qu…ĺi paul bija ka ¶am…ô…ĺoonian mi ¶am…ô…ĺoonian b…ĺańß ¶onńß ¶ukwo***…ĺan ¶…ô sm…ĺiq ka…ĺi ana so ńßmuja mbijax baj muda psbalaj knp…ĺijux qu…ĺi uuda s…ô…üi ka paul bija, binaw s…ôńßu paul bija u ida muda sntu…ĺuŇč sm…ĺiq ka…ĺi qu…ĺi w…ô ¶w…ôn ¶uji. mniq k ¶ka k…ôŇčpo u, paul bija u muda pk…ĺana bijax siŇč ¶Ňč mi bijax pńßiju waja, ijux pk…ĺana qu…ĺi bijax sńßwa mi ddulun nija. wana mniq dnu…ĺun paul bija u kija ka niqan bijax muda smliq waja k…ôŇčpo muda siŇčsa. dndulan nija paul bija ka ¶ŇčtaŇč ¶am…ô…ĺoonian …ünmin min ¶u undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balaj kwońßuj nina (mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * mnuda ka k ¶ka kwońßuj s…ôŇčkjo u, *** ńßiji ka knkana gijiŇč u taŇč dńßa pa wada maŇčal *** ńßiji gijiŇč), so niji ka mnuda kwońßuj u pnduŇčus baj sntaŇčan nija paul bija u sndńßu baj lxanan ńßo…ĺi ¶u. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, am…ô…ĺi ¶a siŇčbuŇč ¶a ¶"pa…ĺad…ô"u wada dńßa Ňčalan"qnlaŇčan tub…ĺańß ** baŇč tu ¶aj ¶…ô" na tu**. kŇčkawas **** idas **, mpatas nija ¶am…ô…ĺoonian ka b…ô…ĺt…ĺand t…ôou u mnatas * patas, k ¶ka nija u matas qu…ĺi ndanan q…ĺidin nija ¶ńßantal bija u snp…ôjańß q…ĺinu ¶ na piŇčmin wada mnqnlńßaŇčan tu* ńßu…ün. babaw nija daw t…ôou u alaw 'tns…ôjax s…ôdiq, mi pssli 'smliq waja mssli' (tam…ôsu muda mn* pt…ĺawańß baj uuda nija u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, alaw p…ôn na london ¶ida kaj sm…ĺuwa muwaj ńßbaŇčan sanun pqita na…ĺux ńßiji nija mi wada plaxun. pnjańßan pnatas *** **
